itwac.description: ItWaC web corpus, lemma-aware (franfranz/Word_Frequency_Lists_ITA). Combined noun+verb+adjective files; auxiliaries and function words excluded by upstream preprocessing.

opensubs.description: OpenSubtitles 2018 Italian (hermitdave/FrequencyWords it_50k.txt), wordform counts lemmatised via simplemma and aggregated per lemma.

wordfreq.description: wordfreq Python library, multi-corpus aggregate (Wikipedia + news + books + subtitles + web + Twitter). The freq_wordfreq value is the native fraction returned by wordfreq.word_frequency() summed across the lemma's surface forms. Multiply by 1e6 for frequency-per-million if useful.
